subcodes.first_line: O thou who art awakened by the breath of God and stirred by His fragrances! I have perused the contents of thy noble letter [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ایتها المتیقظه بنسمه الله و المهتزه بنفحات الله قد اطلعت بمضمون نمیقتک الغراء
subcodes.subjects: @suffering and imprisonment, @interpretation of words and passages in scripture, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity
